title: Soir — Real-Time Video Sync Platform
description: Architected a real-time video synchronization platform enabling seamless shared media playback across browsers and devices.
extensiveDescription: Achieved a sub-50ms latency target between concurrent users.
Implemented secure multi-user auth using Supabase Auth and PostgreSQL Row-Level Security, enforcing role-based access control across a solo-designed full-stack architecture.

title: Vision-Based UI Automation Engine
description: Designed a GUI automation tool using OpenCV for on-screen element detection, enabling reliable workflow replay with 95%+ action accuracy.
extensiveDescription: Architected a RESTful backend with FastAPI and PostgreSQL to persist and manage user-defined automation workflows, supporting multi-user concurrent access.

title: Raspberry Pi Information Display System
description: Collaborated with the Jodrey School’s Computer Technician to deploy an automated digital signage system serving real-time institutional information on campus.
extensiveDescription: Resolved remote-image fetching failures by implementing a local caching layer, increasing display uptime from ~70% to 99%+ over a full academic month.

title: Receipt Digitization & Management Platform
description: Designed and developed a cross-platform receipt management tool (BillScan) using Flutter, Firebase, and OCR libraries.
extensiveDescription: Enabling automatic extraction and categorization of receipt data and reducing manual entry time by over 70% for test users.
Implemented a scalable backend workflow with FastAPI, async OCR processing, and secure cloud storage.
